name: OTW Halal
overview: When Renatta, a glamorous but financially reckless LC (lady companion), is abruptly cut off by her secret lover, she is forced to move into a modest women’s boarding house. To secure a rental discount, she even puts on a hijab and joins weekly study group. Meanwhile, a young preacher, Raffi, arrives to lead Ramadan lessons and soon finds himself drawn to Renatta’s hidden vulnerability. Their gentle chemistry grows, even as Renatta’s messy past threatens to explode as she decides to change her life.
